Home / Services / Electrical Installation Services

Electrical Installation Services

Expert electrical installations for new construction, remodels, and upgrades.

Whether you're building a new home in Southwest Minneapolis, remodeling your kitchen in Uptown, or upgrading your electrical panel in Northeast, Tim Kunkel Electric provides professional electrical installation services to meet your needs. We understand the importance of a properly installed electrical system for safety, efficiency, and convenience.

Our experienced electricians are skilled in all aspects of electrical installation, from wiring and lighting to outlets and appliances. We work closely with homeowners, contractors, and designers to ensure that your electrical system meets your specific requirements and complies with all local codes. We're familiar with the electrical codes specific to Minneapolis and Hennepin County, ensuring your project is up to standard.

We handle a wide range of installation projects, including new home wiring, kitchen and bathroom remodels, basement finishing, electrical panel upgrades, lighting installations, and more. We use only quality materials and proven techniques to ensure the long-term reliability of our installations. With Minneapolis' aging housing stock, proper grounding and surge protection are essential, and we specialize in these critical safety upgrades.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Contact us to discuss your electrical installation project.
  2. 02 Step 2: We'll provide a detailed consultation and estimate.
  3. 03 Step 3: Our team will complete the installation according to your specifications.
  4. 04 Step 4: We'll inspect the installation and ensure your satisfaction.

Benefits

  • Code-compliant installations
  • Experienced and qualified electricians
  • Quality materials and workmanship
  • Customized solutions to meet your needs

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you handle electrical installations for new construction projects?

Yes, we have extensive experience in providing electrical installations for new homes and commercial buildings in Minneapolis.

What types of lighting installations do you offer?

We offer a wide range of lighting installations, including recessed lighting, pendant lighting, track lighting, landscape lighting, and more.

How do I know if I need an electrical panel upgrade?

If your electrical panel is old, damaged, or unable to handle your current electrical load, it may be time for an upgrade. We can assess your panel and recommend the best solution.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with electrical installation services? Contact us today.
